$comment: Source of truth for the bootstrap admin accounts. The seeder reads this file on every server start and: (1) creates the user if missing, (2) promotes the user to role='admin' if they exist with a different role. Passwords are ONLY used when creating a new user — existing users keep their current password. To override in production without committing secrets, set the env var ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_FILE to point at a file outside the repo, or set ADMIN_EMAILS=email1,email2 + ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_PASSWORD=... for inline ENV-only configuration.
